mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_BATCH_HIS ( BATCH_APP_ID, INSTANCE_ID, BATCH_DATE, BATCH_EXECUTE_SEQ, LOG_DTIME, RES_RT_CODE, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{batchAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instanceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{batchDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{batchExecuteSeq, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{logDtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resRtCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_BATCH_HIS WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId} AND RES_RT_CODE = '0'
SELECT RES_RT_CODE FROM ( SELECT RES_RT_CODE FROM FWK_BATCH_HIS WHERE BATCH_APP_ID = #{batchAppId} ORDER BY BATCH_DATE DESC, BATCH_EXECUTE_SEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_BATCH_HIS WHERE BATCH_DATE < #{batchDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.sql: h.BATCH_APP_ID AS batchAppId, h.INSTANCE_ID AS instanceId, h.BATCH_DATE AS batchDate, h.BATCH_EXECUTE_SEQ AS batchExecuteSeq, h.LOG_DTIME AS logDtime, h.BATCH_END_DTIME AS batchEndDtime, h.RES_RT_CODE AS resRtCode, h.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, h.ERROR_CODE AS errorCode, h.ERROR_REASON AS errorReason, h.RECORD_COUNT AS recordCount, h.EXECUTE_COUNT AS executeCount, h.SUCCESS_COUNT AS successCount, h.FAIL_COUNT AS failCount, b.BATCH_APP_NAME AS batchAppName, w.INSTANCE_NAME AS instanceName
FROM FWK_BATCH_HIS h LEFT JOIN FWK_BATCH_APP b ON h.BATCH_APP_ID = b.BATCH_APP_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_WAS_INSTANCE w ON h.INSTANCE_ID = w.INSTANCE_ID

ORDER BY
h.BATCH_APP_ID h.INSTANCE_ID h.BATCH_EXECUTE_SEQ h.BATCH_DATE h.LOG_DTIME h.BATCH_END_DTIME h.RES_RT_CODE h.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID h.RECORD_COUNT h.SUCCESS_COUNT h.FAIL_COUNT h.ERROR_CODE h.LOG_DTIME
ASC DESC DESC
